/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gltron.dir/src/gltron.c.o -o gltron  libsdl_compat.a lua5/liblua5.a lua5/liblualib5.a nebu/libnebu_system.a nebu/video/libnebu_video.a nebu/input/libnebu_input.a nebu/scripting/libnebu_scripting.a nebu/filesystem/libnebu_filesystem.a nebu/base/libnebu_base.a nebu/audio/libnebu_audio.a libcallbacks.a src/game/libgame.a src/input/libinput.a src/audio/libaudio.a src/video/libvideo.a src/configuration/libconfiguration.a src/base/libbase.a src/filesystem/libfilesystem.a lib3ds/liblib3ds.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblua5.1.so -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL_sound.so src/game/libgame.a nebu/video/libnebu_video.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so nebu/input/libnebu_input.a nebu/scripting/libnebu_scripting.a lua5/liblua5.a lua5/liblualib5.a nebu/audio/libnebu_audio.a nebu/base/libnebu_base.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so nebu/filesystem/libnebu_filesystem.a libsdl_compat.a -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -lSDL2 -lm
